indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: no horizontal rest surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other horizontal rest surface present.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows provide natural light or views, which are important for circadian alignment.

indicators.name: no curtains or blinds
indicators.rationale: No window coverings to block light or provide privacy.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: No furniture to provide a resting surface or support.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuited for primary sleep. There are no horizontal rest surfaces, no windows for natural light or views, and no furniture to provide support or comfort. The hard industrial surfaces further contribute to the unsuitability of the space.
